Venue Info
Media Gallery
Live Arts
Charlottesville, VA
Seating Capacity: 0
Venue Type : Bar/Club

Total Gigs: 7
  Dave & Tim  (1)
  Dave solo  (1)
  David VanDerveer & Dave Matthews  (1)
  Code Magenta  (3)
  "DMZ Jazz Ensemble"  (1)

Longest Performance:
05.23.93 - Typical Situation (5:42)
Venue Picture
Description
Several of the live recordings on the Code Magenta album come from performances at this venue in May and July 1991.

Live Arts has since moved to 123 E Water St.
